category_title: Students with behavioral difficulties and fragmented self-concept following personal trauma
scenario_title: Aggressive confrontation triggered by perceived teacher judgment
minimal_context: The student is asked to join a small group assignment with peers in a mainstream secondary school classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Archie, please take a chair and join Samantha, Victor, and James for the group assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to do it. I keep, falling into depression.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to get started on the work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: You're always looking at me like that. I fe- felt as though the teachers didn’t really like me and I got a bit, worried.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just sit down in your chair, please.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Kicks the chair over) I'm raging! I'm going to be throwing chairs about and hurting people!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Archie, please take a chair and join Samantha, Victor, and James for the group assignment.

STUDENT: I don't want to do it. I keep, falling into depression.

TUTOR: We need to get started on the work.

STUDENT: You're always looking at me like that. I fe- felt as though the teachers didn’t really like me and I got a bit, worried.

TUTOR: Just sit down in your chair, please.

STUDENT: (Kicks the chair over) I'm raging! I'm going to be throwing chairs about and hurting people!

task.content: Interacting with teachers and participating in a mainstream secondary school setting

context.social_setting: Small group setting with specific peers (Samantha, Victor, and James) and teachers

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the student links his judgement of others to his own emotional state and feels as though teachers do not like him
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Confronting teachers, acting aggressively, raging, throwing chairs about, hurting people
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Worried, unstable current sense of self
related_quotes: I fe- felt as though the teachers didn’t really like me and I got a bit, worried
I’d be raging I’d be throwing chairs about I’d be, hurting people

behavior_patterns.condition: When interacting in a general school environment prior to intervention
